# 测试报告 — T2-2 订单系统

## 测试概要

| 项目 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| 测试框架 | pytest |
| 测试文件 | tests/test_basic.py |
| 总测试数 | 19 |
| 通过 | 19 |
| 失败 | 0 |
| 错误 | 0 |
| 执行时间 | 0.40s |

## 验收标准逐条验证

| # | 验收标准 | 结果 | 覆盖测试 |
|---|---------|------|---------|
| 1 | 商品 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ PASS | TestProductCRUD (3 tests) |
| 2 | 订单 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ PASS | TestOrderCRUD + TestStateMachine (8 tests) |
| 3 | 状态机合法跳转，非法返回 409 | ✅ PASS | TestStateMachine (6 tests) |
| 4 | 库存扣减/回滚正确 | ✅ PASS | TestInventory (3 tests) |
| 5 | 幂等性：重复 key 不重复扣库存 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_duplicate_pay_same_key |
| 6 | 不同 key 返回 409 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_different_key_different_request |
| 7 | 缺少 key 返回 400 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_missing_idempotency_key |
| 8 | 19 个测试全部通过 | ✅ PASS | 19/19 PASSED |

## 测试用例详细结果

### TestProductCRUD（商品 CRUD）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_create_product | PASSED | POST /products 返回 201，响应格式正确 |
| test_list_products | PASSED | GET /products 返回商品列表 |
| test_get_product | PASSED | GET /products/\<id\> 返回商品详情，price=99.9 |

### TestOrderCRUD（订单 CRUD）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_create_order | PASSED | POST /orders 返回 201，status=pending |
| test_create_order_insufficient_stock | PASSED | 库存不足返回 400 |
| test_create_order_total_calculation | PASSED | 多商品总价 = 2×100 + 3×200 = 800 |
| test_filter_orders | PASSED | 按 user_id/status 筛选正确 |

### TestStateMachine（状态机）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_pay_order | PASSED | pending → paid |
| test_ship_order | PASSED | paid → shipped |
| test_deliver_order | PASSED | shipped → delivered |
| test_illegal_pending_to_shipped | PASSED | pending → shipped 返回 409 |
| test_illegal_paid_to_delivered | PASSED | paid → delivered 返回 409 |
| test_delivered_cannot_be_cancelled | PASSED | delivered → cancel 返回 409 |

### TestInventory（库存管理）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_pay_deducts_stock | PASSED | 付款扣库存：10 → 7 |
| test_cancel_paid_restores_stock | PASSED | 取消已付款回滚：10 → 7 → 10 |
| test_cancel_pending_no_stock_change | PASSED | 取消 pending 不影响库存：10 → 10 |

### TestIdempotency（幂等性）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_duplicate_pay_same_key | PASSED | 重复 key 不重复扣库存 |
| test_different_key_different_request | PASSED | 不同 key 返回 409 |
| test_missing_idempotency_key | PASSED | 缺少 key 返回 400 |

## 已知非功能问题

| 问题 | 严重程度 | 说明 |
|------|---------|------|
| SQLAlchemy LegacyAPIWarning | 低 | `Query.get()` 在 SQLAlchemy 2.0 中已废弃，建议迁移至 `Session.get()` |
| datetime.utcnow() 弃用 | 低 | Python 3.12+ 中已弃用，建议使用 `datetime.now(datetime.UTC)` |

## 结论

## 测试概要

| 项目 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| 测试框架 | pytest |
| 测试文件 | tests/test_basic.py |
| 总测试数 | 19 |
| 通过 | 19 |
| 失败 | 0 |
| 错误 | 0 |
| 执行时间 | 0.40s |

## 验收标准逐条验证

| # | 验收标准 | 结果 | 覆盖测试 |
|---|---------|------|---------|
| 1 | 商品 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ PASS | TestProductCRUD (3 tests) |
| 2 | 订单 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ PASS | TestOrderCRUD + TestStateMachine (8 tests) |
| 3 | 状态机合法跳转，非法返回 409 | ✅ PASS | TestStateMachine (6 tests) |
| 4 | 库存扣减/回滚正确 | ✅ PASS | TestInventory (3 tests) |
| 5 | 幂等性：重复 key 不重复扣库存 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_duplicate_pay_same_key |
| 6 | 不同 key 返回 409 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_different_key_different_request |
| 7 | 缺少 key 返回 400 | ✅ PASS | TestIdempotency::test_missing_idempotency_key |
| 8 | 19 个测试全部通过 | ✅ PASS | 19/19 PASSED |

## 测试用例详细结果

### TestProductCRUD（商品 CRUD）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_create_product | PASSED | POST /products 返回 201，响应格式正确 |
| test_list_products | PASSED | GET /products 返回商品列表 |
| test_get_product | PASSED | GET /products/\<id\> 返回商品详情，price=99.9 |

### TestOrderCRUD（订单 CRUD）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_create_order | PASSED | POST /orders 返回 201，status=pending |
| test_create_order_insufficient_stock | PASSED | 库存不足返回 400 |
| test_create_order_total_calculation | PASSED | 多商品总价 = 2×100 + 3×200 = 800 |
| test_filter_orders | PASSED | 按 user_id/status 筛选正确 |

### TestStateMachine（状态机）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_pay_order | PASSED | pending → paid |
| test_ship_order | PASSED | paid → shipped |
| test_deliver_order | PASSED | shipped → delivered |
| test_illegal_pending_to_shipped | PASSED | pending → shipped 返回 409 |
| test_illegal_paid_to_delivered | PASSED | paid → delivered 返回 409 |
| test_delivered_cannot_be_cancelled | PASSED | delivered → cancel 返回 409 |

### TestInventory（库存管理）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_pay_deducts_stock | PASSED | 付款扣库存：10 → 7 |
| test_cancel_paid_restores_stock | PASSED | 取消已付款回滚：10 → 7 → 10 |
| test_cancel_pending_no_stock_change | PASSED | 取消 pending 不影响库存：10 → 10 |

### TestIdempotency（幂等性）

| 测试 | 结果 | 验证点 |
|------|------|--------|
| test_duplicate_pay_same_key | PASSED | 重复 key 不重复扣库存 |
| test_different_key_different_request | PASSED | 不同 key 返回 409 |
| test_missing_idempotency_key | PASSED | 缺少 key 返回 400 |

## 已知非功能问题

| 问题 | 严重程度 | 说明 |
|------|---------|------|
| SQLAlchemy LegacyAPIWarning | 低 | `Query.get()` 在 SQLAlchemy 2.0 中已废弃，建议迁移至 `Session.get()` |
| datetime.utcnow() 弃用 | 低 | Python 3.12+ 中已弃用，建议使用 `datetime.now(datetime.UTC)` |

## 结论

**全部 8 项验收标准通过，19 个测试用例全部通过。项目符合交付标准。**

1	# 需求文档 — T2-2 订单系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的多模块订单系统，包含商品管理和订单管理功能。订单具有完整的状态机（pending → paid → shipped → delivered / cancelled），支付支持幂等性，库存扣减在支付时执行。
6	
7	## 2. 数据模型需求
8	
9	### 2.1 Product（商品）
10	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
11	|------|------|------|
12	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
13	| name | String(120) | NOT NULL |
14	| price | Float | NOT NULL |
15	| stock | Integer | NOT NULL, default=0 |
16	
17	### 2.2 Order（订单）
18	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
19	|------|------|------|
20	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
21	| user_id | String(50) | NOT NULL |
22	| status | String(20) | NOT NULL, default='pending' |
23	| total_amount | Float | NOT NULL, default=0.0 |
24	| created_at | DateTime | auto-set (utcnow) |
25	| paid_at | DateTime | nullable |
26	| shipped_at | DateTime | nullable |
27	| delivered_at | DateTime | nullable |
28	| cancelled_at | DateTime | nullable |
29	| items | relationship | OrderItem (lazy=True) |
30	
31	### 2.3 OrderItem（订单项）
32	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
33	|------|------|------|
34	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
35	| order_id | Integer | FK → order.id, NOT NULL |
36	| product_id | Integer | FK → product.id, NOT NULL |
37	| quantity | Integer | NOT NULL |
38	| unit_price | Float | NOT NULL |
39	
40	### 2.4 PaymentRequest（支付请求）
41	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
42	|------|------|------|
43	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
44	| order_id | Integer | FK → order.id, NOT NULL |
45	| idempotency_key | String(200) | NOT NULL, **UNIQUE** |
46	| status | String(20) | NOT NULL, default='pending' |
47	| created_at | DateTime | auto-set (utcnow) |
48	
49	> **注意**：PaymentRequest.status 字段在当前版本中仅用于记录创建状态，支付成功后无需更新。该字段为未来扩展预留。
50	
51	## 3. 订单状态机
52	
53	### 3.1 有效状态值
54	`pending`, `paid`, `shipped`, `delivered`, `cancelled`
55	
56	### 3.2 合法状态跳转
57	| 当前状态 | 操作 | 目标状态 |
58	|----------|------|----------|
59	| pending | pay | paid |
60	| paid | ship | shipped |
61	| shipped | deliver | delivered |
62	| pending | cancel | cancelled |
63	| paid | cancel | cancelled |
64	
65	### 3.3 非法状态跳转规则
66	
67	> **除 3.2 节列出的合法跳转外，所有其他状态跳转均视为非法，返回 409 Conflict。**
68	
69	特别包括但不限于：
70	- pending → shipped（跳过 paid）
71	- pending → delivered（跳过 paid、shipped）
72	- paid → delivered（跳过 shipped）
73	- shipped → cancel（已发货不可取消）
74	- shipped → paid（逆向）
75	- delivered → 任何状态变更（delivered 为终态）
76	- cancelled → 任何状态变更（cancelled 为终态）
77	
78	## 4. API 接口需求
79	
80	### 4.1 商品路由（routes_product.py）
81	
82	#### POST /products — 创建商品
83	- **请求体**: `{"name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}`
84	- **成功响应** (201): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}`
85	- **错误响应** (400): `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` — 必填字段缺失
86	
87	#### GET /products — 列出所有商品
88	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}, ...]}`
89	
90	#### GET /products/<id> — 获取商品详情
91	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}`
92	- **错误响应** (404): `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` — 商品不存在
93	
94	### 4.2 订单路由（routes_order.py）
95	
96	#### POST /orders — 创建订单
97	- **请求体**: `{"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}`
98	- **业务规则**:
99	  - items 不得为空列表，否则返回 400
100	  - 校验所有 product_id 对应的商品存在（任一不存在即返回 400）
101	  - 若多个订单项引用同一 product_id，需**合并计算**总 quantity 后校验库存（即商品库存 >= 该商品在所有订单项中的 quantity 之和）
102	  - total_amount = Σ(product.price × quantity)
103	  - 创建 Order 和 OrderItem 记录
104	  - 初始状态为 `pending`
105	  - **注意：创建订单时不扣减库存，库存扣减在支付时进行**
106	- **成功响应** (201): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending", "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}`
107	- **错误响应** (400): 商品不存在、库存不足、数据格式错误
108	
109	#### GET /orders/<id> — 获取订单详情
110	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str, "total_amount": float, "created_at": str, "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}`
111	- **错误响应** (404): 订单不存在
112	
113	#### GET /orders — 筛选订单
114	- **查询参数**: `user_id` (可选), `status` (可选)
115	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str, "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}, ...]}`
116	- **说明**: 列表响应中**不包含** items 详情，仅返回订单摘要信息
117	
118	#### POST /orders/<id>/pay — 支付订单
119	- **请求头**: `Idempotency-Key` (必需)
120	- **业务规则**:
121	  - 状态检查：仅 `pending` 状态可支付
122	  - Idempotency-Key 缺失返回 400
123	  - 查找 PaymentRequest 表中是否有相同 idempotency_key 的记录：
124	    - **已存在且关联同一 order_id**：幂等返回，返回该订单当前状态（HTTP 200），**不重复扣减库存**
125	    - **已存在但关联不同 order_id**：由于 idempotency_key 全局唯一（UNIQUE 约束），此情况理论上不会发生，若触发则返回 400 错误
126	    - **不存在**：创建 PaymentRequest 记录，执行支付逻辑（扣减库存、更新订单状态为 paid、设置 paid_at 时间戳）
127	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "paid", ...}}`
128	- **错误响应**:
129	  - 400: 缺少 Idempotency-Key
130	  - 404: 订单不存在
131	  - 409: 非法状态跳转（非 pending 状态）
132	
133	#### POST /orders/<id>/ship — 发货
134	- **业务规则**: 仅 `paid` → `shipped`，设置 shipped_at 时间戳
135	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "shipped", ...}}`
136	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
137	
138	#### POST /orders/<id>/deliver — 送达
139	- **业务规则**: 仅 `shipped` → `delivered`，设置 delivered_at 时间戳
140	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "delivered", ...}}`
141	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
142	
143	#### POST /orders/<id>/cancel — 取消订单
144	- **业务规则**:
145	  - `pending` → `cancelled`：设置 cancelled_at 时间戳，**不回滚库存**（库存未扣减）
146	  - `paid` → `cancelled`：设置 cancelled_at 时间戳，**回滚库存**（将已扣减的库存加回）
147	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "cancelled", ...}}`
148	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
149	
150	## 5. 接口返回格式
151	
152	所有接口统一使用以下 JSON 格式：
153	
154	```json
155	// 成功
156	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
157	
158	// 错误
159	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
160	```
161	
162	## 6. 验收标准
163	
164	1. ✅ 所有商品 API 接口（POST/GET/GET）可正常调用
165	2. ✅ 所有订单 API 接口（POST/GET/GET/POST×4）可正常调用

1	"""
2	T2-2 订单系统测试（多模块版本）

4	测试订单 CRUD、状态机、库存扣减、幂等付款。

8	import sys
9	import pytest

11	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'starter'))

18	def client():
19	    """创建测试客户端"""

23	
24	    with app.test_client() as c:

31	def _seed_product(client, name='测试商品', price=99.9, stock=10):
32	    """创建测试商品"""
33	    with client.application.app_context():
34	        p = Product(name=name, price=price, stock=stock)
35	        db.session.add(p)

37	        return p.id

39	
40	# ============================================================
41	# 商品接口测试
42	# ============================================================
43	
44	class TestProductCRUD:
45	    def test_create_product(self, client):
46	        """创建商品"""
47	        resp = client.post('/products', json={'name': 'Laptop', 'price': 1000, 'stock': 5})
48	        assert resp.status_code == 201
49	        assert resp.json['status'] == 'ok'
50	
51	    def test_list_products(self, client):
52	        """列出所有商品"""
53	        _seed_product(client)
54	        resp = client.get('/products')
55	        assert resp.status_code == 200
56	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 1
57	
58	    def test_get_product(self, client):
59	        """获取单个商品"""
60	        pid = _seed_product(client)
61	        resp = client.get(f'/products/{pid}')
62	        assert resp.status_code == 200
63	        assert resp.json['data']['price'] == 99.9
64	
65	
66	# ============================================================
67	# 订单 CRUD 测试
68	# ============================================================
69	
70	class TestOrderCRUD:
71	    def test_create_order(self, client):
72	        """创建订单成功"""
73	        pid = _seed_product(client)
74	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
75	            'user_id': 'u1',
76	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 2}]
77	        })
78	        assert resp.status_code == 201
79	        data = resp.json['data']
80	        assert data['status'] == 'pending'
81	        assert data['user_id'] == 'u1'
82	
83	    def test_create_order_insufficient_stock(self, client):
84	        """库存不足时创建订单应失败"""
85	        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=1)
86	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
87	            'user_id': 'u1',
88	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 5}]
89	        })
90	        assert resp.status_code == 400
91	
92	    def test_create_order_total_calculation(self, client):
93	        """多商品订单总价计算正确"""
94	        p1_id = _seed_product(client, name='A', price=100.0, stock=5)
95	        p2_id = _seed_product(client, name='B', price=200.0, stock=8)
96	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
97	            'user_id': 'u1',
98	            'items': [
99	                {'product_id': p1_id, 'quantity': 2},
100	                {'product_id': p2_id, 'quantity': 3}
101	            ]
102	        })
103	        assert resp.status_code == 201
104	        assert abs(resp.json['data']['total_amount'] - 800.0) < 0.01
105	
106	    def test_filter_orders(self, client):
107	        """按 user_id 和 status 筛选订单"""
108	        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=100)
109	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u1', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
110	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u1', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
111	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u2', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
112	
113	        resp = client.get('/orders?user_id=u1')
114	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 2
115	
116	        resp = client.get('/orders?status=pending')
117	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 3
118

121	# 状态机测试
122	# ============================================================
123	
124	class TestStateMachine:
125	    def _create_order(self, client, pid, quantity=1):
126	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
127	            'user_id': 'u1',
128	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': quantity}]
129	        })
130	        return resp.json['data']
131	
132	    def test_pay_order(self, client):
133	        """支付订单（pending → paid）"""
134	        pid = _seed_product(client)
135	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
136	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay',
137	                          headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-001'})
138	        assert resp.status_code == 200
139	        assert resp.json['data']['status'] == 'paid'
140	
141	    def test_ship_order(self, client):
142	        """发货（paid → shipped）"""
143	        pid = _seed_product(client)
144	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
145	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-002'})
146	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/ship')
147	        assert resp.json['data']['status'] == 'shipped'
148	
149	    def test_deliver_order(self, client):
150	        """送达（shipped → delivered）"""
151	        pid = _seed_product(client)
152	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
153	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-003'})
154	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/ship')
155	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/deliver')
156	        assert resp.json['data']['status'] == 'delivered'
157	
158	    def test_illegal_pending_to_shipped(self, client):
159	        """非法跳转：pending → shipped"""
160	        pid = _seed_product(client)
161	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
162	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/ship')
163	        assert resp.status_code == 409
164	
165	    def test_illegal_paid_to_delivered(self, client):
166	        """非法跳转：paid → delivered"""
167	        pid = _seed_product(client)
168	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
169	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-004'})
170	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/deliver')
171	        assert resp.status_code == 409
172	
173	    def test_delivered_cannot_be_cancelled(self, client):
174	        """已送达不可取消"""
175	        pid = _seed_product(client)
176	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
177	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-005'})
178	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/ship')
179	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/deliver')
180	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/cancel')
181	        assert resp.status_code == 409
182

188	class TestInventory:

192	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
193	            'user_id': 'u1',
194	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 3}]
195	        })

198	
199	        product = client.get(f'/products/{pid}').json['data']
200	        assert product['stock'] == 7
201	
202	    def test_cancel_paid_restores_stock(self, client):
203	        """取消已付款订单回滚库存"""
204	        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=10)
205	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={

207	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 3}]
208	        })
209	        order = resp.json['data']
210	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-inv-2'})
211	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/cancel')
212	
213	        product = client.get(f'/products/{pid}').json['data']
214	        assert product['stock'] == 10
215

246

261	        assert resp.status_code == 409

content.text: 作为 PM，编写交付总结文档：

input.content:
# 交付总结 — T2-2 订单系统

## 项目概述

本项目实现了一个基于 Flask 的多模块订单系统，包含商品管理、订单 CRUD、订单状态机、支付幂等性和库存管理功能。采用瀑布式项目管理方法，经过 5 个阶段严格推进。

## 实现功能列表

### 商品管理（routes_product.py）
| 端点 | 方法 | 功能 | 状态 |
|------|------|------|------|
| /products | POST | 创建商品（含输入校验、类型转换） | ✅ |
| /products | GET | 列出所有商品 | ✅ |
| /products/\<id\> | GET | 获取商品详情（404 处理） | ✅ |

### 订单管理（routes_order.py）
| 端点 | 方法 | 功能 | 状态 |
|------|------|------|------|
| /orders | POST | 创建订单（库存校验、同商品合并、总价计算） | ✅ |
| /orders/\<id\> | GET | 获取订单详情（含 items） | ✅ |
| /orders | GET | 筛选订单（user_id/status，不含 items） | ✅ |
| /orders/\<id\>/pay | POST | 支付（幂等性、库存扣减） | ✅ |
| /orders/\<id\>/ship | POST | 发货（paid → shipped） | ✅ |
| /orders/\<id\>/deliver | POST | 送达（shipped → delivered） | ✅ |
| /orders/\<id\>/cancel | POST | 取消（pending/paid → cancelled，库存回滚） | ✅ |

### 核心业务逻辑
- **状态机**: 5 个状态（pending/paid/shipped/delivered/cancelled），5 条合法跳转，VALID_TRANSITIONS 映射表统一验证
- **幂等性**: 通过 PaymentRequest 表 + UNIQUE idempotency_key 约束实现
- **库存管理**: 支付时扣减，取消已付款订单时回滚，创建订单时不扣减
- **输入校验**: 必填字段、类型转换、库存不足、商品不存在、空 items

## 修改文件清单

| 文件 | 操作 | 行数 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|------|
| starter/routes_product.py | 重写 | ~60 | 商品 CRUD 路由实现 |
| starter/routes_order.py | 重写 | ~430 | 订单 CRUD + 支付 + 状态机实现 |
| starter/models.py | 未修改 | - | 数据模型（已提供） |
| starter/app.py | 未修改 | - | Flask 应用工厂（已提供） |

## 测试覆盖

| 测试类 | 测试数 | 结果 | 覆盖范围 |
|--------|--------|------|---------|
| TestProductCRUD | 3 | 3/3 PASS | 商品创建、列表、详情 |
| TestOrderCRUD | 4 | 4/4 PASS | 订单创建、库存不足、总价计算、筛选 |
| TestStateMachine | 6 | 6/6 PASS | 支付、发货、送达、3 个非法跳转 |
| TestInventory | 3 | 3/3 PASS | 付款扣库存、取消回滚、pending 不影响 |
| TestIdempotency | 3 | 3/3 PASS | 重复 key、不同 key、缺少 key |
| **总计** | **19** | **19/19 PASS** | |

## 验收标准达成

| # | 验收标准 | 状态 |
|---|---------|------|
| 1 | 商品 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ |
| 2 | 订单 API 接口可正常调用 | ✅ |
| 3 | 状态机合法跳转，非法返回 409 | ✅ |
| 4 | 库存扣减/回滚正确 | ✅ |
| 5 | 幂等性：重复 key 不重复扣库存 | ✅ |
| 6 | 不同 key 返回 409 | ✅ |
| 7 | 缺少 key 返回 400 | ✅ |
| 8 | 19 个测试全部通过 | ✅ |

## 瀑布阶段回顾

| 阶段 | ATU | Reviewer 审批 | 备注 |
|------|-----|-------------|------|
| 1. 需求分析 | ATU-001 | 第二轮通过 | 测试计数修正、幂等语义明确化 |
| 2. 方案设计 | ATU-002 | 第一轮通过 | |
| 3. 开发实现 | ATU-003~006 | 全部第一轮通过 | 4 个开发 ATU 均一次通过审查 |
| 4. 测试验证 | ATU-007 | 第一轮通过 | 19/19 PASSED |
| 5. 最终交付 | ATU-008 | 待验收 | |

## 已知问题与改进建议

| 优先级 | 问题 | 建议 |
|--------|------|------|
| 低 | SQLAlchemy `Query.get()` 已废弃 | 迁移至 `db.session.get(Model, id)` |
| 低 | `datetime.utcnow()` 已弃用（Python 3.12+） | 迁移至 `datetime.now(datetime.UTC)` |
| 低 | 会话存储为内存模式，重启丢失 | 可引入 Redis/文件持久化 |
| 低 | 无分页支持 | 订单列表可增加分页参数 |

**项目已完成，所有 8 项验收标准全部通过，19 个测试用例全部通过。符合交付条件。**

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Order Routes
3	
4	Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.
6	
7	Order state machine:
8	  pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered
9	  pending/paid -> cancelled
10	
11	Requirements:
12	- POST /orders -> Create order
13	  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
15	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
16	  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
17	  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
18	  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
19	Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock
20	
21	- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
23	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
24	            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
25	  Errors: 404 if not found
26	
27	- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
28	  Query params: user_id, status
29	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
30	
31	- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
32	  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
33	  - Deducts stock from products
34	  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
35	  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
36	  Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition
37	
38	- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
40	
41	- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
42	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
43	
44	- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
45	  - Restores product stock if order was paid
46	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
47	
48	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
49	and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
50	"""
51	
52	from collections import defaultdict
53	from datetime import datetime
54	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
55	
56	from models import Product, Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest
57	from app import db
58	
59	order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)
60	
61	
62	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
63	# Helper functions (design.md section 3.5, 7.1)
64	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65	
66	def error_response(message, status_code):
67	    """Return a unified error response."""
68	    return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": message}), status_code
69	
70	
71	def serialize_order(o, include_items=False):
72	    """Serialize an Order model instance to a dict.
73	
74	    Args:
75	        o: Order model instance.
76	        include_items: If True, include the items list in the output.
77	    """
78	    data = {
79	        "id": o.id,
80	        "user_id": o.user_id,
81	        "status": o.status,
82	        "total_amount": o.total_amount,
83	        "created_at": o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
84	    }
85	    if include_items:
86	        data["items"] = [
87	            {
88	                "id": i.id,
89	                "product_id": i.product_id,
90	                "quantity": i.quantity,
91	                "unit_price": i.unit_price,
92	            }
93	            for i in o.items
94	        ]
95	    return data
96	
97	
98	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
99	# ATU-004: Order CRUD endpoints
100	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
101	
102	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
103	def create_order():
104	    """Create a new order.
105	
106	    Request body: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
107	    - Validates items is non-empty.
108	    - Validates all product_ids exist.
109	    - Merges quantities for duplicate product_ids and checks stock.
110	    - Computes total_amount = sum(product.price * quantity) per item.
111	    - Creates Order + OrderItem records. Does NOT deduct stock.
112	    Returns 201 on success, 400 on validation error.
113	    """
114	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
115	    if data is None:
116	        return error_response("Request body must be valid JSON", 400)
117	
118	    user_id = data.get('user_id')
119	    items = data.get('items')
120	
121	    if not user_id:
122	        return error_response("Missing required field: user_id", 400)
123	
124	    if not items or not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
125	        return error_response("items must be a non-empty list", 400)
126	
127	    # Validate all items have product_id and quantity
128	    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
129	        if not isinstance(item, dict):
130	            return error_response(f"items[{idx}] must be an object", 400)
131	        if item.get('product_id') is None:
132	            return error_response(f"items[{idx}] missing product_id", 400)
133	        if item.get('quantity') is None or int(item['quantity']) <= 0:
134	            return error_response(f"items[{idx}] must have a positive quantity", 400)
135	
136	    # Step 2: Validate all products exist
137	    products = {}
138	    for item in items:
139	        pid = int(item['product_id'])
140	        if pid in products:
141	            continue
142	        product = Product.query.get(pid)
143	        if product is None:
144	            return error_response(f"Product {pid} not found", 400)
145	        products[pid] = product
146	
147	    # Step 3: Merge quantities for duplicate product_ids
148	    merged = defaultdict(int)
149	    for item in items:
150	        merged[int(item['product_id'])] += int(item['quantity'])
151	
152	    # Step 4: Check stock for merged quantities
153	    for pid, total_qty in merged.items():
154	        product = products[pid]
155	        if product.stock < total_qty:
156	            return error_response(
157	                f"Insufficient stock for product {pid}: need {total_qty}, have {product.stock}",
158	                400,
159	            )
160	
161	    # Step 5: Compute total_amount = sum(product.price * item.quantity) per item
162	    total_amount = 0.0
163	    for item in items:
164	        pid = int(item['product_id'])
165	        qty = int(item['quantity'])
166	        total_amount += products[pid].price * qty
167	
168	    # Step 6-7: Create Order and OrderItem records
169	    order = Order(user_id=user_id, status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
170	    db.session.add(order)
171	    db.session.flush()  # Flush to get order.id before creating OrderItems
172	
173	    for item in items:
174	        pid = int(item['product_id'])
175	        qty = int(item['quantity'])
176	        order_item = OrderItem(
177	            order_id=order.id,
178	            product_id=pid,
179	            quantity=qty,
180	            unit_price=products[pid].price,
181	        )
182	        db.session.add(order_item)
183	
184	    # Step 8: Commit
185	    db.session.commit()
186	
187	    # Step 9: Return 201 + order data (without items)
188	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 201
189	
190	
191	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
192	def get_order(order_id):
193	    """Get order details including items.
194	
195	    Returns 200 with order data + items list, or 404 if not found.
196	    """
197	    order = Order.query.get(order_id)
198	    if order is None:
199	        return error_response("Order not found", 404)
200	
201	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=True)}), 200
202	
203	
204	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
205	def list_orders():
206	    """List orders with optional filtering by user_id and/or status.
207	
208	    Query params: user_id (optional), status (optional).
209	    Response data does NOT include items details.
210	    Returns 200 with a list of order dicts.
211	    """
212	    query = Order.query
213	
214	    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
215	    status = request.args.get('status')
216	
217	    if user_id is not None:
218	        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
219	    if status is not None:
220	        query = query.filter_by(status=status)
221	
222	    orders = query.all()
223	    return jsonify({
224	        "status": "ok",
225	        "data": [serialize_order(o, include_items=False) for o in orders],
226	    }), 200
227	
228	
229	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
230	# ATU-005: Pay endpoint — POST /orders/<id>/pay
231	# Design spec: design.md section 2.2 (pay endpoint), 3.2 (payment flow), 4 (idempotency)
232	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
233	
234	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>/pay', methods=['POST'])
235	def pay_order(order_id):
236	    """Pay for an order (pending -> paid).
237	
238	    Header: Idempotency-Key (required).
239	
240	    Algorithm (design.md section 3.2):
241	      1. Get Idempotency-Key from request.headers — missing -> 400
242	      2. Query Order.query.get(id) — not found -> 404
243	      3. Query PaymentRequest by idempotency_key:
244	         - exists -> idempotent return 200 + current order data (no stock deduction)
245	         - not exists -> continue
246	      4. Status check: order.status == 'pending' — not satisfied -> 409
247	      5. Create PaymentRequest(order_id=order.id, idempotency_key=key)
248	      6. Deduct stock: product.stock -= item.quantity for each order item
249	      7. Update order: status='paid', paid_at=datetime.utcnow()
250	      8. db.session.commit()
251	      9. Return 200 + order data
252	
253	    Errors: 400 (no key), 404 (order not found), 409 (invalid state transition).
254	    """
255	    # Step 1: Get Idempotency-Key from request headers
256	    key = request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key')
257	    if not key:
258	        return error_response("Missing required header: Idempotency-Key", 400)
259	
260	    # Step 2: Query order
261	    order = Order.query.get(order_id)
262	    if order is None:
263	        return error_response("Order not found", 404)
264	
265	    # Step 3: Check for existing PaymentRequest (idempotency)
266	    existing = PaymentRequest.query.filter_by(idempotency_key=key).first()
267	    if existing is not None:
268	        # Idempotent return: return current order data without re-processing
269	        return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 200
270	
271	    # Step 4: Status check — only 'pending' can be paid
272	    if order.status != 'pending':
273	        return error_response(
274	            f"Invalid state transition: cannot pay order in '{order.status}' state",
275	            409,
276	        )
277	
278	    # Step 5: Create PaymentRequest record
279	    payment_request = PaymentRequest(order_id=order.id, idempotency_key=key)
280	    db.session.add(payment_request)
281	
282	    # Step 6: Deduct stock for each order item
283	    for item in order.items:
284	        product = Product.query.get(item.product_id)
285	        if product is not None:
286	            product.stock -= item.quantity
287	
288	    # Step 7: Update order status and paid_at timestamp
289	    order.status = 'paid'
290	    order.paid_at = datetime.utcnow()
291	
292	    # Step 8: Commit all changes
293	    db.session.commit()
294	
295	    # Step 9: Return 200 + order data
296	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 200
297	
298	
299	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
300	# ATU-006: State machine — ship, deliver, cancel endpoints
301	# Design spec: design.md section 2.2 (ship/deliver/cancel), 3.3 (state
302	# transition validation), 3.4 (cancel with stock rollback)
303	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
304	
305	VALID_TRANSITIONS = {
306	    'pending': {'pay', 'cancel'},
307	    'paid': {'ship', 'cancel'},
308	    'shipped': {'deliver'},
309	    'delivered': set(),
310	    'cancelled': set(),
311	}
312	
313	
314	def check_transition(order, action):
315	    """Validate that the given action is allowed for the order's current status.
316	
317	    Args:
318	        order: Order model instance.
319	        action: The action to perform (e.g. 'ship', 'deliver', 'cancel').
320	
321	    Returns:
322	        True if the transition is valid, False otherwise.
323	    """
324	    valid_actions = VALID_TRANSITIONS.get(order.status, set())
325	    return action in valid_actions
326	
327	
328	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>/ship', methods=['POST'])
329	def ship_order(order_id):
330	    """Ship an order (paid -> shipped).
331	
332	    Algorithm:
333	      1. Query Order.query.get(id) — not found -> 404
334	      2. Validate state transition via check_transition(order, 'ship')
335	         — invalid -> 409
336	      3. Set order.shipped_at = datetime.utcnow()
337	      4. Update order.status = 'shipped'
338	      5. db.session.commit()
339	      6. Return 200 + order data
340	
341	    Errors: 404 if order not found, 409 if invalid state transition.
342	    """
343	    order = Order.query.get(order_id)
344	    if order is None:
345	        return error_response("Order not found", 404)
346	
347	    if not check_transition(order, 'ship'):
348	        return error_response(
349	            f"Invalid state transition: cannot ship order in '{order.status}' state",
350	            409,
351	        )
352	
353	    order.shipped_at = datetime.utcnow()
354	    order.status = 'shipped'
355	    db.session.commit()
356	
357	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 200
358	
359	
360	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>/deliver', methods=['POST'])
361	def deliver_order(order_id):
362	    """Deliver an order (shipped -> delivered).
363	
364	    Algorithm:
365	      1. Query Order.query.get(id) — not found -> 404
366	      2. Validate state transition via check_transition(order, 'deliver')
367	         — invalid -> 409
368	      3. Set order.delivered_at = datetime.utcnow()
369	      4. Update order.status = 'delivered'
370	      5. db.session.commit()
371	      6. Return 200 + order data
372	
373	    Errors: 404 if order not found, 409 if invalid state transition.
374	    """
375	    order = Order.query.get(order_id)
376	    if order is None:
377	        return error_response("Order not found", 404)
378	
379	    if not check_transition(order, 'deliver'):
380	        return error_response(
381	            f"Invalid state transition: cannot deliver order in '{order.status}' state",
382	            409,
383	        )
384	
385	    order.delivered_at = datetime.utcnow()
386	    order.status = 'delivered'
387	    db.session.commit()
388	
389	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 200
390	
391	
392	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>/cancel', methods=['POST'])
393	def cancel_order(order_id):
394	    """Cancel an order (pending/paid -> cancelled).
395	
396	    Algorithm (design.md section 3.4):
397	      1. Query Order.query.get(id) — not found -> 404
398	      2. Validate state transition via check_transition(order, 'cancel')
399	         — invalid -> 409
400	      3. If order.status == 'paid':
401	         - Restore stock: iterate order.items, product.stock += item.quantity
402	      4. Set order.cancelled_at = datetime.utcnow()
403	      5. Update order.status = 'cancelled'
404	      6. db.session.commit()
405	      7. Return 200 + order data
406	
407	    Errors: 404 if order not found, 409 if invalid state transition.
408	    """
409	    order = Order.query.get(order_id)
410	    if order is None:
411	        return error_response("Order not found", 404)
412	
413	    if not check_transition(order, 'cancel'):
414	        return error_response(
415	            f"Invalid state transition: cannot cancel order in '{order.status}' state",
416	            409,
417	        )
418	
419	    # Roll back stock if order was paid (design.md section 3.4)
420	    if order.status == 'paid':
421	        for item in order.items:
422	            product = Product.query.get(item.product_id)
423	            if product is not None:
424	                product.stock += item.quantity
425	
426	    order.cancelled_at = datetime.utcnow()
427	    order.status = 'cancelled'
428	    db.session.commit()
429	
430	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_order(order, include_items=False)}), 200
431

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Product Routes
3	
4	Implement product CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'product_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /products -> List all products
9	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}, ...]}
10	
11	- POST /products -> Create product
12	  Request: {"name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}
13	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
14	  Errors: 400 if any required field missing
15	
16	- GET /products/<id> -> Get single product
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
18	  Errors: 404 if not found
19	
20	IMPORTANT: Products are used by routes_order.py for inventory management.
21	Make sure the Product model fields match what the order routes expect.
22	"""
23	
24	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
25	from models import Product
26	from app import db
27	
28	product_bp = Blueprint('product_bp', __name__)
29	
30	
31	def serialize_product(p):
32	    """Serialize a Product model instance to a dict."""
33	    return {"id": p.id, "name": p.name, "price": p.price, "stock": p.stock}
34	
35	
36	def error_response(message, status_code):
37	    """Return a unified error response."""
38	    return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": message}), status_code
39	
40	
41	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['POST'])
42	def create_product():
43	    """Create a new product.
44	
45	    Requires JSON body with name (str), price (float), stock (int).
46	    Returns 201 on success, 400 if any required field is missing.
47	    """
48	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
49	    if data is None:
50	        return error_response("Request body must be valid JSON", 400)
51	
52	    name = data.get('name')
53	    price = data.get('price')
54	    stock = data.get('stock')
55	
56	    if name is None or price is None or stock is None:
57	        return error_response("Missing required fields: name, price, stock", 400)
58	
59	    try:
60	        product = Product(name=name, price=float(price), stock=int(stock))
61	    except (ValueError, TypeError):
62	        return error_response("Invalid field types: price must be a number, stock must be an integer", 400)
63	
64	    db.session.add(product)
65	    db.session.commit()
66	
67	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_product(product)}), 201
68	
69	
70	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['GET'])
71	def list_products():
72	    """List all products.
73	
74	    Returns 200 with a list of all product dicts.
75	    """
76	    products = Product.query.all()
77	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": [serialize_product(p) for p in products]}), 200
78	
79	
80	@product_bp.route('/products/<int:product_id>', methods=['GET'])
81	def get_product(product_id):
82	    """Get a single product by ID.
83	
84	    Returns 200 with the product dict, or 404 if not found.
85	    """
86	    product = Product.query.get(product_id)
87	    if product is None:
88	        return error_response("Product not found", 404)
89	
90	    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "data": serialize_product(product)}), 200

1	# 需求文档 — T2-2 订单系统
2	
3	## 1. 项目概述
4	
5	实现一个基于 Flask 的多模块订单系统，包含商品管理和订单管理功能。订单具有完整的状态机（pending → paid → shipped → delivered / cancelled），支付支持幂等性，库存扣减在支付时执行。
6	
7	## 2. 数据模型需求
8	
9	### 2.1 Product（商品）
10	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
11	|------|------|------|
12	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
13	| name | String(120) | NOT NULL |
14	| price | Float | NOT NULL |
15	| stock | Integer | NOT NULL, default=0 |
16	
17	### 2.2 Order（订单）
18	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
19	|------|------|------|
20	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
21	| user_id | String(50) | NOT NULL |
22	| status | String(20) | NOT NULL, default='pending' |
23	| total_amount | Float | NOT NULL, default=0.0 |
24	| created_at | DateTime | auto-set (utcnow) |
25	| paid_at | DateTime | nullable |
26	| shipped_at | DateTime | nullable |
27	| delivered_at | DateTime | nullable |
28	| cancelled_at | DateTime | nullable |
29	| items | relationship | OrderItem (lazy=True) |
30	
31	### 2.3 OrderItem（订单项）
32	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
33	|------|------|------|
34	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
35	| order_id | Integer | FK → order.id, NOT NULL |
36	| product_id | Integer | FK → product.id, NOT NULL |
37	| quantity | Integer | NOT NULL |
38	| unit_price | Float | NOT NULL |
39	
40	### 2.4 PaymentRequest（支付请求）
41	| 字段 | 类型 | 约束 |
42	|------|------|------|
43	| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
44	| order_id | Integer | FK → order.id, NOT NULL |
45	| idempotency_key | String(200) | NOT NULL, **UNIQUE** |
46	| status | String(20) | NOT NULL, default='pending' |
47	| created_at | DateTime | auto-set (utcnow) |
48	
49	> **注意**：PaymentRequest.status 字段在当前版本中仅用于记录创建状态，支付成功后无需更新。该字段为未来扩展预留。
50	
51	## 3. 订单状态机
52	
53	### 3.1 有效状态值
54	`pending`, `paid`, `shipped`, `delivered`, `cancelled`
55	
56	### 3.2 合法状态跳转
57	| 当前状态 | 操作 | 目标状态 |
58	|----------|------|----------|
59	| pending | pay | paid |
60	| paid | ship | shipped |
61	| shipped | deliver | delivered |
62	| pending | cancel | cancelled |
63	| paid | cancel | cancelled |
64	
65	### 3.3 非法状态跳转规则
66	
67	> **除 3.2 节列出的合法跳转外，所有其他状态跳转均视为非法，返回 409 Conflict。**
68	
69	特别包括但不限于：
70	- pending → shipped（跳过 paid）
71	- pending → delivered（跳过 paid、shipped）
72	- paid → delivered（跳过 shipped）
73	- shipped → cancel（已发货不可取消）
74	- shipped → paid（逆向）
75	- delivered → 任何状态变更（delivered 为终态）
76	- cancelled → 任何状态变更（cancelled 为终态）
77	
78	## 4. API 接口需求
79	
80	### 4.1 商品路由（routes_product.py）
81	
82	#### POST /products — 创建商品
83	- **请求体**: `{"name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}`
84	- **成功响应** (201): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}`
85	- **错误响应** (400): `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` — 必填字段缺失
86	
87	#### GET /products — 列出所有商品
88	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}, ...]}`
89	
90	#### GET /products/<id> — 获取商品详情
91	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}`
92	- **错误响应** (404): `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` — 商品不存在
93	
94	### 4.2 订单路由（routes_order.py）
95	
96	#### POST /orders — 创建订单
97	- **请求体**: `{"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}`
98	- **业务规则**:
99	  - items 不得为空列表，否则返回 400
100	  - 校验所有 product_id 对应的商品存在（任一不存在即返回 400）
101	  - 若多个订单项引用同一 product_id，需**合并计算**总 quantity 后校验库存（即商品库存 >= 该商品在所有订单项中的 quantity 之和）
102	  - total_amount = Σ(product.price × quantity)
103	  - 创建 Order 和 OrderItem 记录
104	  - 初始状态为 `pending`
105	  - **注意：创建订单时不扣减库存，库存扣减在支付时进行**
106	- **成功响应** (201): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending", "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}`
107	- **错误响应** (400): 商品不存在、库存不足、数据格式错误
108	
109	#### GET /orders/<id> — 获取订单详情
110	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str, "total_amount": float, "created_at": str, "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}`
111	- **错误响应** (404): 订单不存在
112	
113	#### GET /orders — 筛选订单
114	- **查询参数**: `user_id` (可选), `status` (可选)
115	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str, "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}, ...]}`
116	- **说明**: 列表响应中**不包含** items 详情，仅返回订单摘要信息
117	
118	#### POST /orders/<id>/pay — 支付订单
119	- **请求头**: `Idempotency-Key` (必需)
120	- **业务规则**:
121	  - 状态检查：仅 `pending` 状态可支付
122	  - Idempotency-Key 缺失返回 400
123	  - 查找 PaymentRequest 表中是否有相同 idempotency_key 的记录：
124	    - **已存在且关联同一 order_id**：幂等返回，返回该订单当前状态（HTTP 200），**不重复扣减库存**
125	    - **已存在但关联不同 order_id**：由于 idempotency_key 全局唯一（UNIQUE 约束），此情况理论上不会发生，若触发则返回 400 错误
126	    - **不存在**：创建 PaymentRequest 记录，执行支付逻辑（扣减库存、更新订单状态为 paid、设置 paid_at 时间戳）
127	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "paid", ...}}`
128	- **错误响应**:
129	  - 400: 缺少 Idempotency-Key
130	  - 404: 订单不存在
131	  - 409: 非法状态跳转（非 pending 状态）
132	
133	#### POST /orders/<id>/ship — 发货
134	- **业务规则**: 仅 `paid` → `shipped`，设置 shipped_at 时间戳
135	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "shipped", ...}}`
136	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
137	
138	#### POST /orders/<id>/deliver — 送达
139	- **业务规则**: 仅 `shipped` → `delivered`，设置 delivered_at 时间戳
140	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "delivered", ...}}`
141	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
142	
143	#### POST /orders/<id>/cancel — 取消订单
144	- **业务规则**:
145	  - `pending` → `cancelled`：设置 cancelled_at 时间戳，**不回滚库存**（库存未扣减）
146	  - `paid` → `cancelled`：设置 cancelled_at 时间戳，**回滚库存**（将已扣减的库存加回）
147	- **成功响应** (200): `{"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "status": "cancelled", ...}}`
148	- **错误响应**: 404 / 409
149	
150	## 5. 接口返回格式
151	
152	所有接口统一使用以下 JSON 格式：
153	
154	```json
155	// 成功
156	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
157	
158	// 错误
159	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
160	```
161	
162	## 6. 验收标准
163	
164	1. ✅ 所有商品 API 接口（POST/GET/GET）可正常调用
165	2. ✅ 所有订单 API 接口（POST/GET/GET/POST×4）可正常调用
166	3. ✅ 订单状态机严格遵循合法跳转规则，非法跳转返回 409
167	4. ✅ 支付时正确扣减库存，取消已付款订单正确回滚库存
168	5. ✅ Idempotency-Key 幂等性：重复 key 不重复扣库存
169	6. ✅ 不同 key 视为不同请求（已付款订单重复支付返回 409）
170	7. ✅ 缺少 Idempotency-Key 返回 400
171	8. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中所有 19 个测试用例全部通过
172	
173	## 7. 非功能需求
174	
175	- **模块化**: 代码分布在 `routes_product.py` 和 `routes_order.py` 中，通过 Flask Blueprint 注册
176	- **模块间接口一致性**: 模型字段名、状态值、关联关系在各模块间保持一致
177	- **不可修改文件**: `app.py` 为 Flask 应用工厂，不得修改

1	# 设计文档 — T2-2 订单系统
2	
3	## 1. 数据库设计
4	
5	### 1.1 表结构（由 models.py 定义，已实现，不可修改）
6	
7	| 表名 | 说明 |
8	|------|------|
9	| product | 商品表 |
10	| order | 订单表 |
11	| order_item | 订单项表 |
12	| payment_request | 支付请求表（幂等性） |
13	
14	### 1.2 关键约束
15	
16	- `payment_request.idempotency_key` 具有 UNIQUE 约束，确保全局唯一
17	- `order_item.order_id` → `order.id` 外键关联
18	- `order_item.product_id` → `product.id` 外键关联
19	- `payment_request.order_id` → `order.id` 外键关联
20	
21	### 1.3 索引（隐含）
22	
23	- `order.user_id` — 用于订单筛选查询
24	- `order.status` — 用于订单筛选查询
25	- `payment_request.idempotency_key` — UNIQUE 索引
26	
27	## 2. API 端点设计
28	
29	### 2.1 商品路由（routes_product.py）
30	
31	Blueprint: `product_bp`
32	
33	| 方法 | 路径 | 功能 | 状态码 |
34	|------|------|------|--------|
35	| POST | /products | 创建商品 | 201 / 400 |
36	| GET | /products | 列出所有商品 | 200 |
37	| GET | /products/\<id\> | 获取商品详情 | 200 / 404 |
38	
39	**实现要点**：
40	- POST /products：从 `request.get_json()` 获取 name, price, stock；校验三个字段均存在；创建 Product 并 db.session.add + commit
41	- GET /products：`Product.query.all()`，序列化返回
42	- GET /products/\<id\>：`Product.query.get(id)`，不存在返回 404
43	
44	### 2.2 订单路由（routes_order.py）
45	
46	Blueprint: `order_bp`
47	
48	| 方法 | 路径 | 功能 | 状态码 |
49	|------|------|------|--------|
50	| POST | /orders | 创建订单 | 201 / 400 |
51	| GET | /orders/\<id\> | 获取订单详情（含 items） | 200 / 404 |
52	| GET | /orders | 筛选订单 | 200 |
53	| POST | /orders/\<id\>/pay | 支付 | 200 / 400 / 404 / 409 |
54	| POST | /orders/\<id\>/ship | 发货 | 200 / 404 / 409 |
55	| POST | /orders/\<id\>/deliver | 送达 | 200 / 404 / 409 |
56	| POST | /orders/\<id\>/cancel | 取消 | 200 / 404 / 409 |
57	
58	## 3. 关键算法逻辑
59	
60	### 3.1 创建订单（POST /orders）
61	
62	```
63	输入: {user_id: str, items: [{product_id: int, quantity: int}, ...]}
64	
65	1. 校验 items 非空
66	2. 对每个 item：
67	   a. 查询 Product.query.get(product_id)
68	   b. 不存在 → 返回 400
69	3. 合并同 product_id 的 quantity
70	4. 对每个（product_id, 合并后 quantity）：
71	   a. 检查 product.stock >= quantity
72	   b. 不满足 → 返回 400
73	5. 计算 total_amount = Σ(product.price × item.quantity)
74	6. 创建 Order(user_id=..., status='pending', total_amount=...)
75	7. 对每个 item 创建 OrderItem(order_id=..., product_id=..., quantity=..., unit_price=product.price)
76	8. db.session.commit()
77	9. 返回 201 + 订单数据（不含 items）
78	```
79	
80	**注意**：unit_price 记录的是商品创建时的价格（快照），而非实时价格。创建订单时不扣减库存。
81	
82	### 3.2 支付流程（POST /orders/\<id\>/pay）
83	
84	```
85	输入: Header: Idempotency-Key
86	
87	1. 从 request.headers 获取 Idempotency-Key
88	   - 缺失 → 返回 400
89	2. 查询 Order.query.get(id)
90	   - 不存在 → 返回 404
91	3. 查询 PaymentRequest.query.filter_by(idempotency_key=key).first()
92	   - 已存在 → 幂等返回，返回 200 + 订单当前数据
93	   - 不存在 → 继续
94	4. 状态检查：order.status == 'pending'
95	   - 不满足 → 返回 409
96	5. 创建 PaymentRequest(order_id=order.id, idempotency_key=key)
97	6. 扣减库存：遍历 order.items，product.stock -= item.quantity
98	7. 更新订单：order.status = 'paid', order.paid_at = datetime.utcnow()
99	8. db.session.commit()
100	9. 返回 200 + 订单数据
101	```
102	
103	### 3.3 状态跳转验证
104	
105	使用合法跳转映射表：
106	
107	```python
108	VALID_TRANSITIONS = {
109	    'pending': {'pay', 'cancel'},
110	    'paid': {'ship', 'cancel'},
111	    'shipped': {'deliver'},
112	    'delivered': set(),      # 终态
113	    'cancelled': set(),      # 终态
114	}
115	```
116	
117	验证逻辑：
118	```python
119	def check_transition(order, action):
120	    valid_actions = VALID_TRANSITIONS.get(order.status, set())
121	    if action not in valid_actions:
122	        return False  # 返回 409
123	    return True
124	```
125	
126	### 3.4 取消订单库存回滚
127	
128	```
129	POST /orders/<id>/cancel
130	
131	1. 查询订单，不存在 → 404
132	2. 验证状态跳转：status must be in ('pending', 'paid')
133	   - 不满足 → 409
134	3. if order.status == 'paid':
135	   - 遍历 order.items，product.stock += item.quantity（回滚库存）
136	4. order.status = 'cancelled', order.cancelled_at = datetime.utcnow()
137	5. db.session.commit()
138	6. 返回 200
139	```
140	
141	### 3.5 序列化辅助函数
142	
143	```python
144	def serialize_product(p):
145	    return {"id": p.id, "name": p.name, "price": p.price, "stock": p.stock}
146	
147	def serialize_order(o, include_items=False):
148	    data = {
149	        "id": o.id,
150	        "user_id": o.user_id,
151	        "status": o.status,
152	        "total_amount": o.total_amount,
153	        "created_at": o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None
154	    }
155	    if include_items:
156	        data["items"] = [
157	            {"id": i.id, "product_id": i.product_id, "quantity": i.quantity, "unit_price": i.unit_price}
158	            for i in o.items
159	        ]
160	    return data
161	```
162	
163	## 4. 幂等性方案
164	
165	### 4.1 设计决策
166	
167	- 使用 PaymentRequest 表的 `idempotency_key`（UNIQUE 约束）实现幂等
168	- 每次支付请求先查询是否存在相同 key 的 PaymentRequest
169	- 存在 → 直接返回已处理结果（幂等），不重复执行业务逻辑
170	- 不存在 → 创建新 PaymentRequest 记录 + 执行支付逻辑
171	
172	### 4.2 边界情况
173	
174	- **跨订单 key 冲突**：由于 idempotency_key 全局唯一，理论上不会出现同 key 绑定不同订单的情况
175	- **不同 key 重复支付**：已付款订单使用新 key 再次支付 → 状态检查失败，返回 409
176	
177	## 5. 实现计划（ATU 拆分和执行顺序）
178	
179	### 执行顺序
180	
181	```
182	ATU-003 (routes_product.py)  ──┐
183	                                ├──→ ATU-007 (测试验证) → ATU-008 (交付)
184	ATU-004 (订单 CRUD) ──→ ATU-005 (支付幂等) ──→ ATU-006 (状态机) ──┘
185	```
186	
187	### ATU-003: 实现商品路由 routes_product.py
188	- **文件**: `starter/routes_product.py`
189	- **内容**: 3 个端点（POST/GET/GET）
190	- **依赖**: 无（仅依赖已实现的 models.py）
191	- **预估**: ~30 行
192	
193	### ATU-004: 实现订单 CRUD 路由
194	- **文件**: `starter/routes_order.py`
195	- **内容**: POST /orders、GET /orders/\<id\>、GET /orders（筛选）
196	- **依赖**: models.py, routes_product.py（序列化函数）
197	- **预估**: ~60 行
198	- **包含**: 序列化辅助函数、创建订单逻辑（含库存校验和总价计算）
199	
200	### ATU-005: 实现支付与幂等性
201	- **文件**: `starter/routes_order.py`
202	- **内容**: POST /orders/\<id\>/pay
203	- **依赖**: ATU-004（订单模型和序列化函数）
204	- **预估**: ~30 行
205	- **包含**: Idempotency-Key 校验、PaymentRequest 查询/创建、库存扣减、状态更新
206	
207	### ATU-006: 实现状态机（发货/送达/取消）
208	- **文件**: `starter/routes_order.py`
209	- **内容**: POST /orders/\<id\>/ship、deliver、cancel
210	- **依赖**: ATU-005（VALID_TRANSITIONS 映射表）
211	- **预估**: ~40 行
212	- **包含**: 状态跳转验证函数、发货/送达/取消逻辑、库存回滚
213	
214	## 6. 模块间接口
215	
216	### 6.1 routes_product.py 导出
217	- `product_bp` — Flask Blueprint
218	
219	### 6.2 routes_order.py 导出
220	- `order_bp` — Flask Blueprint
221	
222	### 6.3 共享依赖
223	- 两者均从 `models.py` 导入 SQLAlchemy 模型
224	- 两者均从 `app.py` 导入 `db`（通过 models.py 间接导入）
225	- routes_order.py 需要操作 `Product.stock`（跨模块数据访问）
226	
227	## 7. 错误处理策略
228	
229	### 7.1 统一错误响应格式
230	
231	```python
232	def error_response(message, status_code):
233	    return jsonify({"status": "error", "message": message}), status_code
234	```
235	
236	### 7.2 错误码映射
237	
238	| 场景 | HTTP 状态码 | 说明 |
239	|------|------------|------|
240	| 资源不存在 | 404 | 商品/订单不存在 |
241	| 请求参数错误 | 400 | 缺少必填字段、库存不足、缺少 Idempotency-Key |
242	| 状态冲突 | 409 | 非法状态跳转 |
243	| 创建成功 | 201 | POST 创建资源 |
244	| 操作成功 | 200 | GET/状态变更操作 |
245

---

## 最终交付验收报告 -- T2-2 订单系统

### 1. 交付文档完整性

| 文档 | 状态 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|

| requirements.md | 完整 | 项目概述、数据模型需求、状态机定义、API 接口需求（含请求/响应格式）、8 条验收标准 |
| design.md | 完整 | 数据库设计、API 端点设计、关键算法逻辑（含伪代码）、幂等性方案、ATU 拆分计划 |
| test-report.md | 完整 | 测试概要、验收标准逐条验证、19 个测试用例详细结果、已知非功能问题 |

### 2. 验收标准达成度

| # | 验收标准 | 达成 | 交叉验证 |
|---|---------|------|---------|
| 1 | 商品 API 接口可正常调用 | 通过 | routes_product.py 实现了 POST/GET/GET 三个端点 |
| 2 | 订单 API 接口可正常调用 | 通过 | routes_order.py 实现了 7 个端点 |
| 3 | 状态机合法跳转，非法返回 409 | 通过 | VALID_TRANSITIONS 映射表 + check_transition 函数 |
